data.name: Fates: Determination
data.detailed_description:
沉浸在一個與我們極為相似，卻隱藏著黑暗祕密的世界中。擁有非凡能力的異能者生活在我們之中，躲藏在陰影裡。一個祕密政府機構正在追捕他們，聲稱他們對人類構成了威脅。但事實真的如此嗎？

準備好迎接一段驚心動魄、感人至深且寫實的故事。從對立的兩面體驗這場衝突：獵人與獵物。感受力量的重擔及其伴隨的責任。或者，不惜一切代價阻止擁有力量的人。一切真的那麼簡單嗎？你的行動能改變主角周圍的世界嗎？你有能力塑造他們的命運嗎？

扮演傑克 (Jake)

在《Fates》中，你將透過雙重觀點體驗故事。

首先是傑克。一個只想過正常生活的普通大學生。但命運的轉折揭示了他體內沉睡的力量，這將永遠改變他的生存方式。現在，他必須在這個「正常」已不再是選項的危險新現實中尋找出路。

扮演艾咪 (Amy)

然後是艾咪。剛從 FBI 學院畢業，她在一​​個僅被稱為「公司 (The Company)」的祕密政府部門開始了新的職業生涯。她渴望效力，但對自己真正面臨的一切一無所知。

在這兩個角色之間來回切換，從對立的立場體驗一段複雜交織的敘事。

成熟的冒險體驗

《Fates: Determination》不僅提供了一個深刻非凡的故事，還透過高品質的可選成人場景加以潤色。

更想專注於劇情？沒問題。每一個親密場景都可以透過遊戲內的選擇跳過。如果你願意，完全可以自由享受整個故事，而不必觀看任何一場性愛場景。

每一個選擇都至關重要

在遊戲中，你將不得不為兩位主角做出艱難的決定。這些選擇將決定傑克和艾咪所走的道路。他們會走上正義之路還是毀滅之途？

根據你的決定，故事將發生顯著的分支。你能解鎖所有 4 種不同的結局嗎？

主要特色

  • 3000 多張靜態圖片

  • 31 個全動畫 30fps 性愛場景

  • 6-8 小時的遊戲時長

  • 6 個章節式劇情

data.short_description: 《Fates: Determination》是一款雙視角的劇情向成人冒險遊戲。隨著傑克和艾咪的道路發生碰撞，透過他們的眼睛體驗故事。準備好迎接一段充滿戲劇性、懸疑、超能力和火辣性愛場景的劇情吧！

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7
  • 處理器: 1 Ghz
  • 記憶體: 512 MB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: DirectX or OpenGL compatible card
  • 儲存空間: 2300 MB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統

mac_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Mac OS X 10.6
  • 處理器: 1 Ghz
  • 記憶體: 512 MB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: DirectX or OpenGL compatible card
  • 儲存空間: 2300 MB 可用空間

linux_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Ubuntu / SteamOS
  • 處理器: 1 Ghz
  • 記憶體: 512 MB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: DirectX or OpenGL compatible card
  • 儲存空間: 2300 MB 可用空間

data.name: Fates: Determination
data.detailed_description:
Immerse yourself in a world just like ours, but with a dark secret. Individuals gifted with extraordinary powers live among us, hiding in the shadows. A clandestine government agency hunts them down, claiming they pose a threat to humanity. But do they really?

Prepare for a thrilling, emotional, and gritty narrative. Experience the conflict from both sides of the divide: the hunter and the hunted. Feel the burden of power and the responsibility that comes with it. Or, do whatever it takes to stop those who wield it. Is it all really that simple? Can your actions change the world around our protagonists? Do you have what it takes to shape their fate?

Play as Jake

In Fates, you experience the story through dual perspectives.

First, there is Jake. A typical college student who simply wants a normal life. But a twist of fate reveals dormant powers that will change his existence forever. Now, he must navigate a dangerous new reality where "normal" is no longer an option.

Play as Amy

Then there is Amy. Fresh out of the FBI Academy, she starts her new career with a secret government division known only as "The Company." She is eager to serve, but she has no idea what is truly waiting for her.

Jump back and forth between these two characters to experience a complex, weaving narrative from opposing sides.

A Mature Adventure

Fates: Determination offers not only a deep, extraordinary story but enhances it with optional high-quality adult scenes.

Prefer to focus on the plot? No problem. Every intimate scene can be bypassed through in-game choices. You have the freedom to enjoy the entire story without seeing a single sex scene if you choose.

Every Choice Matters

Throughout the game, you will face difficult decisions for both protagonists. These choices will determine the path Jake and Amy take. Will they walk a path of righteousness or ruin?

Depending on your decisions, the story will branch significantly. Can you unlock all 4 distinct endings?

Key features

  • 3000 static images

  • 31 fully animated 30fps sex scenes

  • 6-8 hours of gameplay

  • 6 episodic chapters

data.short_description: Fates: Determination is a story-driven adult adventure played from dual perspectives. Experience the narrative through the eyes of Jake and Amy as their paths collide. Prepare for a plot full of drama, mystery, superpowers, and hot sex scenes!
